name: dynatrace-connector
title: Dynatrace Connector
description: Monitor your Dynatrace environment directly from Raycast — search logs, track problems, inspect deployments and entities.
author: yaroslav_volenyuk

preferences.name: useMockData
preferences.title: Use Mock Data
preferences.description: Use fake local data instead of real Dynatrace API (for development)
preferences.label: Enable mock mode

preferences.name: jiraUrl
preferences.title: Jira URL
preferences.description: Your Jira Cloud instance URL (e.g., https://yourcompany.atlassian.net)

preferences.name: jiraEmail
preferences.title: Jira Email
preferences.description: Email address for Jira API authentication

preferences.name: jiraApiToken
preferences.title: Jira API Token
preferences.description: API token for Jira authentication (from Jira account settings)

preferences.name: jiraProjectKey
preferences.title: Jira Project Key
preferences.description: Default project key for creating issues (e.g., OPS, DEVOPS)

preferences.name: enableAlerts
preferences.title: Background Problem Alerts
preferences.description: Enable periodic checks for new open problems
preferences.label: Enable background alerts

commands.name: dt
commands.title: Dynatrace
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: All Dynatrace commands in one place — logs, problems, traces, deployments, entities and more

commands.name: dt-search-logs
commands.title: Search Logs
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Search Dynatrace Grail logs with DQL filters

commands.name: dt-entities
commands.title: Find Entity
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Search services, hosts and process groups

commands.name: dt-saved-queries
commands.title: Saved DQL Queries
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Manage and run saved DQL queries

commands.name: dt-tenants
commands.title: Manage Tenants
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Add, edit and switch between Dynatrace tenants

commands.name: dt-menubar-problems
commands.title: Problems in Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Show open problem count in macOS menu bar

commands.name: dt-traces
commands.title: Search Traces
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Search distributed traces with filtering by service, status and duration

commands.name: dt-alerts
commands.title: Background Problem Alerts
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Monitor for new OPEN problems and send notifications

commands.name: dt-test-connection
commands.title: Test Connection
commands.subtitle: Dynatrace
commands.description: Test tenant connection and view configuration details

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
